title: Google Sheets requires refresh token for scheduled workflows
symptom: When a scheduled workflow using the Google Sheets node runs, it throws an error stating 'refreshToken is required'. This prevents the workflow from executing successfully.
not_this_if: Workflow runs successfully in manual execution mode
root_cause: The Google Sheets node requires a refresh token to authenticate API requests for scheduled executions. If the credentials used do not include a refresh token, the node cannot access the Google Sheets API, leading to this error.
fix_steps: Create a Google Service Account in the Google Cloud Console.
Share the Google Sheet with the email address of the Service Account.
Update the Google Sheets node in n8n to use the Service Account credentials.
agent_instruction: Create a Google Service Account and update the Google Sheets node to use its credentials.
